lines.text: There is a Pokemon so disturbing that Nintendo literally deleted it from history.
Meet Pokemon number zero. Or rather, you cant.
In early Gold and Silver prototypes, there existed a creature with no face.
Just a twisted mass of pixels that corrupted save files when encountered.
Dataminers found its original Pokedex entry.
It read: This Pokemon remembers being alive.
Nintendo scrubbed every trace from the final release.
No official statement. No acknowledgment it ever existed.
But heres the thing. Missingno wasnt a glitch.
It was the placeholder they used to fill the void this thing left behind.

broll_cues.search_query: Pokemon Gold Silver beta prototype gameplay
ghost Pokemon dark creepy lavender town

outro_line: Some Pokemon arent caught. Theyre contained.

It read: This Pokemon remembers being alive. Nintendo scrubbed every trace from the final release. No official statement. No acknowledgment it ever existed. But heres the thing. Missingno wasnt a glitch. It was the placeholder they used to fill the void this thing left behind.

_topic.title: This Pokemon Was Erased From Existence By Nintendo
_topic.hook: There is a Pokemon so disturbing that Nintendo literally deleted it from history.
_topic.angle: Kadabra was banned from the TCG for over 20 years because a real psychic sued Nintendo claiming they stole his identity and powers.
